scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @maze/shared && npm run build --workspace @maze/server && npm run build --workspace @maze/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @maze/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @maze/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @maze/client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @maze/shared && npm run dev --workspace @maze/server
scripts.dev:client: npm run build --workspace @maze/shared && npm run dev --workspace @maze/client
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @maze/shared && npm run dev --workspace @maze/server
